title: Preparation of M9 Media
author: NUS iGEM
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8cjhsun

steps.title: Prepare 5x M9 salt, 1M calcium...
steps.instruction: Prepare 5x M9 salt, 1M calcium chloride and magnesium sulfate solutions respectively using the following reagents. M9 Minimal Salts 5X Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M9956 1 M Calcium Chloride (CaCl2) Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP510 1 Liter Magnesium sulfate solution [1M] G-Biosciences Catalog #786-530

steps.title: Add 200 mL M9 Minimal Salts...
steps.instruction: Add 200 mL M9 Minimal Salts 5X Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M9956 100 mL 2% casamino 100 µL 1 M Calcium Chloride (CaCl2) Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP510 2 mL 1 Liter Magnesium sulfate solution [1M] G-Biosciences Catalog #786-530

steps.title: Top up with sterile deionized water...
steps.instruction: Top up with sterile deionized water to make a litre of M9 media. Water refers to sterilized deionized water Contributed by users
